title: Sujebi with Delicate Korean Greens
description: A light and refreshing Korean noodle soup made with delicate springy noodles, sujebi, and a variety of greens.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the delicate springy noodles according to the package instructions.
In a separate pot, combine the gochujang, soy sauce, sesame oil, and sugar. Bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Add the sujebi noodles to the pot and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until they are heated through.
Add the chopped lettuce and Korean chives to the pot and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with additional Korean chives if desired.
